title: Year validation beyond spec (type + range 0..2100)
evidence: app.py:82-88 validates year is an integer within range, returning 400 otherwise

title: Duplicate-ISBN handling returns 409
evidence: app.py:102-103 and app.py:178-179 catch sqlite3.IntegrityError on the UNIQUE isbn column

title: PUT supports partial updates
evidence: app.py:148-151 falls back to existing values for omitted fields; test_partial_update at test_app.py:250

title: Idiomatic/code-quality scores moderate (idiomatic=0.67, code_quality=0.79)
evidence: scores.json: idiomatic=0.67, code_quality=0.7889; e.g. create_book and update_book duplicate the title/author/year validation block (app.py:75-88 vs 154-167)
suggestion: Factor the shared validation into a helper to lift the quality/idiomatic scores.

title: Author filter uses substring LIKE match
evidence: app.py:113-116 filters with LIKE '%author%' rather than exact match; covered by test_author_filter_partial_match (test_app.py:271)
suggestion: None — substring match is a defensible interpretation of ?author= filter.
